=== Bob Dylan Recording Artist Volume 2.txt
===================
===================
===================
silver discs > eac > wav > flac > AIFF > Apple Lossless (for tagging and renaming) > back to FLAC


Bob Dylan

Hollow Horn RECORDING ARTIST Series Volume 2

Now Your Mouth Cries Wolf

Disc 1


Bringing It All Back Home
January 1965

Love Minus Zero / No Limit
I'll Keep It With Mine
If You Gotta Go. Go Now
It's All Over Now. Baby Blue
She Belongs To Me
Subterranean Homesick Blues
California
Farewell Angelina
You Don't Have To Do That


Levy's Recording Studio, London
May 12, 1965

Bob Dylan Convention Speech


Highway 61 Revisited
June - August 1965

CO 86449
Sitting On A Barbed Wire Fence
Phantom Engineer
Like A Rolling Stone
Sitting On A Barbed Wire Fence
Positively 4th Street
Desolation Row
From A Buick 6
Can You Crawl Out Your Window?
Like A Rolling Stone



Disc 2

Blonde On Blonde
October 1965 - March 1966


Medicine Sunday
Can You Crawl Out Your Window?
I Wanna Be Your Lover
Jet Pilot Eyes
Can You Crawl Out Your Window?
I Wanna Be Your Lover
Visions Of Johanna
She's Your Love Now
I Wanna Be Your Lover
Number One
Visions Of Johanna
I'll Keep It With Mine
She's Your Lover Now
CO 83135



Filler:

Blonde On Blonde UK Mono  Mixes

Rainy Day Women #12&35 
Pledging My Time 
One Of Us Must Know 
4th Time Around 
Obviously 5 Believers
